item.title: Real people pay the price
item.description:
Every kid deserves to be an annoying little shit.
Children are being taught implicitly to be afraid. To stay quiet. The regressive right make up boogeymen and use it to scare children.
A good dad is a good dad.
Felt like this should reach as many eyes as possible.
item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: And now, for something uplifting!
item.description: It just struck me as I’m uploading this, how AMAZING and historic this split screen video is! The first Black Woman Vice President of the United States announcing the nomination confirmation of the first Black Woman Supreme Court Justice!! ..........I’m going to need a minute.....

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #15
item.description:
Credit to - @DarthGoodguy for this meme!
Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8IwCPIC0xc (Previous fundraiser was here https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u) Thank you to everyone who has sent well wishes, donated, and followed us thus far, we are very grateful for every like, message, and dollar, they make a tremendous difference. * ***EDIT*** - Woke up to a most viral notification and a lot of upvotes and comments, wow. I’m really glad people are enjoying these memes! Thank you guys for the upvotes, the comments, and the donations, they are making a difference. He has no other income, his savings are long since spent, and he’s been waiting on even temporary disability to kick in since he initially left work in December (before his prognosis was updated) and it’s now April. He has applied for a few other emergency aid programs as well through DHS at both a state and local charity level and is still waiting.) Your donations are keeping him housed and fed, keeping his heat on (where we live I won’t be warm enough to turn it off for a month yet), and keeping his necessary prescriptions covered. He has no luxuries, no cable, no WiFi, and he sold his possessions of value. These donations are keeping him alive in a very real sense, and I can’t thank you guys enough. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur 14- https://imgur.com/gallery/z8a2fuX

Typical boomer.
A little tighter, champ.
Been there.
Woke.
Some friendly advice when difficult feelings pop up.
I can feel it.
Nature is wild sometimes.

item.title: As a Floridian. More Nikki less Ron
item.description: More Nikki Fried, less Ron DeSantis. Hate to be political but Florida Dems have no ground game here and we continually lose to corrupt Republicans (such as lord Voldemort himself). So this is a Nikki visibility post. Vote in 22. Preferably not for Ron. https://nikkifried.com/ Link as an edit because I thought this post would go nowhere. That’s all. Defeat DeSantis!
item.dc:creator: ThesePipesAreClean

item.title: Kharkiv was a little scarier than normal yesterday
item.description: Volunteers are driving in Saltivka, Kharkiv, Ukraine. Our sub group - KhHelp, helps Tera Oborona, and the needy by delivering supplies on a daily basis. They accept requests through social media channels, then prioritize them and get to work. Yesterday was rougher than usual for them, please take a look. We are absolutely blessed to be supporting such brave young patriots. -- edit -- You guys are too generous. Thank you for all the kind words and support. There were a few requests for a direct link to our donations page, here it is: https://gogetfunding.com/kharkiv-civilian-relief-efforts If you want to contribute your time and skills, there is also this form you can fill out in order to join our international volunteer group, Katata (Its a discord channel backed by a few other services): https://forms.gle/AguEaKgWFQkoWrsX7 We need translators, software, social media, marketing, legal and Admin.
item.dc:creator: kharkivcivrelief
